title: stenogyne forbesii
intro: Stenogyne forbesii, also known as Forbes' stenogyne, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. Traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine, this plant has been recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stenogyne forbesii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Herbal preparations of Stenogyne forbesii are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
